content: Backend: Remove duplicate /api/users/claim-daily and /api/users/streak from user_routes.py (keep me/ascension)
Backend: Update EnterDrawResponse model + draws_routes.enter_draw_endpoint to surface ascension bonus
Backend: Add db.transactions indexes (user_id+created_at, type) in db.py
Backend: Restart backend + curl-test /api/claims/* unchanged + /api/users/me/ascension + simulate 30-day ascension award
Frontend: Add Ascension progress card to DashboardPage with premium dark-luxury style
Frontend: Show celebratory toast on enter_draw response when ascension_bonus.awarded === true (DrawDetailPage)
Verify: lint frontend + screenshot dashboard + run testing_agent for regression check
